rows.label: tev000193_MSG0001
rows.name: Ah, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000193_MSG0002
rows.name:
It's good to see that you're
learning your way around the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000193_MSG0003
rows.name:
It's been a while since I've had a chance to
stroll through the commercial district like
this. It's made quite an impression on me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000193_MSG0004
rows.name:
How about you? I can't help but wonder
how you see this city of ours, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000193_JNK0010
rows.name: Praise

rows.label: tev000193_SEL0011
rows.name: Answer that it's just like being back on Earth.

rows.label: tev000193_JNK0020
rows.name: Observe

rows.label: tev000193_SEL0021
rows.name: Comment on humans and xenoforms living together.

rows.label: tev000193_JNK0030
rows.name: Question

rows.label: tev000193_SEL0031
rows.name: Grill Nagi about when the city will finally be finished.

rows.label: tev000193_MSG0005
rows.name:
Heh heh. I guess even an amnesiac can
sense how much NLA feels like home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000193_MSG0006
rows.name:
Of course, we can't recapture the
scale of an actual Earth city
overnight. NLA will need time to grow.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000193_MSG0007
rows.name:
But it isn't nostalgia that moved me
earlier. I was struck by something else.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000193_MSG0008
rows.name:
Mira is the first planet we
humans have ever colonized.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000193_MSG0009
rows.name:
Even as we struggle with the Growth and the missing
Lifepoint, we've managed to ally with xenoforms
and eke out a fairly good existence as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000193_MSG0010
rows.name:
As I gaze upon this natural landscape, seeing
passing humans and xenoforms interacting peacefully
with one another, it starts to restore my faith.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000193_MSG0011
rows.name:
Perhaps this universe isn't
so wretched after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000193_MSG0012
rows.name:
I was struck by the exact same
thing. It's truly wonderful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000193_MSG0013
rows.name:
Mira is the first planet we
humans have ever colonized.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000193_MSG0014
rows.name:
Even as we struggle with the Growth and the missing
Lifepoint, we've managed to ally with xenoforms
and eke out a fairly good existence as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000193_MSG0015
rows.name:
As I gaze upon this natural landscape, seeing
passing humans and xenoforms interacting peacefully
with one another, it starts to restore my faith.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000193_MSG0016
rows.name:
Perhaps this universe isn't
so wretched after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000193_MSG0017
rows.name: Heh. You don't mince words, do you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000193_MSG0018
rows.name:
I certainly hope you aren't
that...pointed when you're
speaking with the director general.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000193_MSG0019
rows.name:
With BLADE claiming so much of the
city's manpower, the construction
teams are seriously understaffed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000193_MSG0020
rows.name:
As a result, the city itself is progressing at a
relatively sluggish pace. I think that's something
we'll just have to endure for the foreseeable future.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000193_MSG0021
rows.name:
However, I'm well aware that this
city will be too small for all of
us once we reclaim our real bodies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000193_MSG0022
rows.name:
At that point, we plan to enlist the help of our new
xenoform friends and strive to complete projects at a
more aggressive pace. Here's hoping for the best.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000193_MSG0023
rows.name:
In any case, if you don't mind,
I'm going to walk around this
area a little bit more.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000193_MSG0024
rows.name:
I'm here looking for a teacup that I
can keep in your section of the Home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000193_MSG0025
rows.name: It's been a pleasure, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]
